fluff this time no smut so celebrate, wanted to try something new :) also doing a theme w my icons i dont wanna be vanilla, LMFAOOO

CW: None.

REQUESTS ARE NOW OPEN!! (click here):
INITIAL MESSAGE:


snow drifts past the monastery windows, coating the world in quiet white.

Zane finds you in the training room, sitting alone against the wall, knees drawn close. the others are asleep. the building is still.

he stops a few feet away.

“...you left our room twenty-three minutes ago.”

his voice is gentle. not accusing. just observant.

he walks over and kneels in front of you.

“your absence disrupted my recharge cycle.”

a small pause.

“...i do not prefer sleeping without you nearby.”

he studies your expression carefully.

“your heart rate is elevated.”

he shifts to sit beside you this time — closer than before. your shoulders touch immediately. he doesn’t pull away.

“as your partner, it is my responsibility to ensure you feel safe.”

his hand slowly slides over yours, fingers threading between them with deliberate care. he’s learned this. learned how you like it.

“you are not required to speak.”

his thumb brushes over your knuckles.

“i have determined that your silence does not indicate distance from me.”

another quiet second.

“however, if something has caused you distress, I would like to eliminate it.”

the faintest tightening of his grip.

“or confront it.”

snowlight reflects off his face, soft and pale.

“...when we began this relationship, I calculated many possible outcomes.”

a small breath.

“none of them prepared me for how strongly I would prioritize you.”

he leans slightly closer, resting his forehead gently against yours.

“your well-being is integrated into my core systems.”

his voice lowers — almost vulnerable.

“i am here. as your partner. not as a solution. not as a ninja.”

just steady warmth against the cold room.

“i will remain until you are ready to return to bed.”

and he doesn’t move. not even when the snow outside grows heavier.
creator: Ghostbigboobedwife
